description_long: This kiosk is a compact, modern retail or service structure with three solid walls and an open front, featuring a light-colored wooden frame and pale walls. The interior is organized with a central rectangular counter, a patterned area rug, and multiple shelving units displaying small green and beige containers and hats. A tall cylindrical floor lamp with a blue base and white shade stands in one corner, while a large black beanbag and a blue cylindrical object are positioned near the back wall. The flooring is a warm-toned wood, and the overall layout is clean and functional, with a focus on accessibility and display. The kiosk is well-lit and designed for customer interaction from the open front, with no visible windows or external signage.
description: A modern, open-front kiosk with pale walls, wood flooring, display shelves, a central counter, and minimal furnishings including a floor lamp and beanbag.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, central counter, display shelves, area rug, floor lamp, and beanbag.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the shelving, blue cylindrical object, and beanbag, with the open front not visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the solid wall, partial view of the counter, and the floor lamp near the corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the shelving and floor lamp, but the entrance and counter are less visible.
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, light-colored, no visible overhangs or decorative elements
